name: DolaiRoyHybridVDPDuffingRC
summary: Interactive MATLAB GUI for hybrid Van der Pol-Duffing simulation with Simscape RC and Nth-order RC ladder support.
description: Public MATLAB toolbox distribution for hybrid Van der Pol-Duffing nonlinear dynamics. The release includes installable MATLAB toolbox artifacts for Simscape RC realization, Nth-order RC ladder modeling, nonlinear-dynamics visualization, and Arduino Due workflow support.

provider.name: Mr. Sujay Kumar Dolai and Dr. Somnath Roy
